violations.text: Persons unnecessary to the food establishment were observed in the food preparation, food storage, and/or warewashing areas.PIC informed New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023
Boxes of chips were observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023

The: 1. 2 bread cupboards located in the sandwich prep area were not in good repair. A bolt was missing in each cupboard. Bolts must be replaced. 2.The walk in cooler was observed in poor repair(ambient temperature 47 degrees F).Ambient temperature 43-44 at exit interview/ PIC informed to remove TCS foods from walk in cooler to a colder refrigeration unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023
